card.title: Features
card.description: Choose which optional features your organization uses. Turning a feature on makes it visible to team members who have been granted it. Admins always have access to every enabled feature.
card.descriptionNonAdmin: Only admins can change which features are enabled for the organization.

pdfExport.label: PDF export & printing
pdfExport.description: Export patient summaries, lab reports, and imaging studies as PDFs. Adds print-friendly views on detail pages.

billing.label: Billing & invoicing
billing.description: Create invoices for patient visits, track payments, and manage a service catalog.

inventory.label: Inventory management
inventory.description: Track stock for consumables and medications, record receipts and dispenses, and get low-stock alerts.

vitals.label: Vitals & growth charts
vitals.description: Record patient vital signs (height, weight, temperature, blood pressure, etc.) and plot pediatric growth against WHO reference curves.

trends.label: Longitudinal trend charts
trends.description: Plot patient measurements (vitals, lab numeric results) as multi-series line charts over time.

user.popoverHint: Pick which enabled features this team member can see.
user.adminHint: Admins always have access to every enabled feature.
